# Awesome Emerging — LLM-Ready Catalog

> A curated list of emerging open source projects that actually matter.
> Signal-filtered, momentum-tracked, community-curated.

**Last updated**: 2026-03-13
**Website**: https://tidoemanuele.github.io/awesome-emerging/
**GitHub**: https://github.com/tidoemanuele/awesome-emerging

---

## Signal Legend

| Rating | Meaning | Threshold |
|--------|---------|----------|
| 🔥 Hot | Massive community attention | >500 HN points or >10k GitHub stars |
| ⚡ Rising | Clear upward trajectory | >100 HN points or >1k GitHub stars |
| 🌱 Early | Promising but nascent | Growing interest |

---

## AI Agents & Frameworks

Frameworks, tools, and infrastructure for building, deploying, and orchestrating AI agents.

**65 projects**

### 🌱 [1Code](https://github.com/21st-dev/1code)

AI-powered code generation tool by 21st.dev.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-16
- **Signal**: 🌱 39 HN points
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🔥 [agency-agents](https://github.com/msitarzewski/agency-agents)

Pre-built agent marketplace — shell-based agent configurations for instant deployment. 37,059 stars, Day 5 controlled deceleration at +4,168/day (still 3x expected — new elevated baseline above 4K/day).

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-10
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 37,059 stars (+4,168/day)
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### 🔥 [Agent Lightning](https://github.com/microsoft/agent-lightning)

Microsoft's high-velocity agent framework — 12,951 GitHub stars.

- **Discovered**: 2026-02-02
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 12,951 stars
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### ⚡ [AgentMail](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=46812608)

Email API for AI agents — YC S25 launch with 106 HN points.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-30
- **Signal**: ⚡ 106 HN points
- **Tags**: `agent`

### 🌱 [AgentServe](https://github.com/PropsAI/agentserve)

Deploy AI agents as REST APIs with auto-scaling infrastructure.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-27
- **Signal**: 🌱 9 HN points
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### 🌱 [Akshen]()

Community-driven repository of verified, tested AI prompts.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-26
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked

### 🌱 [APA AI Protocol](https://www.apaaiprotocol.org)

Standard protocol for agent-to-agent communication and interoperability.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-27
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked

### 🔥 [BettaFish](https://github.com/666ghj/BettaFish)

Chinese-origin multi-agent sentiment analysis framework — 37,654 stars. Part of the 666ghj swarm intelligence ecosystem.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-10
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 37,654 stars
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### 🌱 [AutoGen](https://github.com/microsoft/autogen)

Microsoft's multi-agent conversation framework for complex AI workflows.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-29
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🌱 [ChartGPU](https://github.com/ChartGPU/ChartGPU)

GPU-accelerated charting library for real-time high-performance data visualization.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-22
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🌱 [claude-code-orchestrator](https://github.com/mohsen1/claude-code-orchestrator)

Tmux + credit rotation wrapper for running multiple Claude Code sessions.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-25
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🌱 [claude-flow](https://github.com/ruvnet/ruflo)

External orchestration layer for Claude Code — model-agnostic multi-agent coordination.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-25
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🔥 [claude-mem](https://github.com/thedotmack/claude-mem)

Persistent memory layer for Claude — 18,077 stars, viral adoption.

- **Discovered**: 2026-02-02
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 18,077 stars
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### ⚡ [claude-sneakpeek](https://github.com/mikekelly/claude-sneakpeek)

Inspect Claude's internal reasoning and tool calls before they execute.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-25
- **Signal**: ⚡ 287 HN points
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🌱 [claude-subconscious](https://github.com/letta-ai/claude-subconscious)

Persistent subconscious memory layer for Claude agents using Letta.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-27
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### ⚡ [contract-agents]()

Formal behavioral contracts for AI agents — Design by Contract pattern applied to agent systems. Exited trending on Day 4 as predicted. ~1,250 stars.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-11
- **Signal**: ⚡ ⭐ ~1,250 stars (stabilized)
- **Tags**: `agent` `security` `open-source`

### 🌱 [Context7 MCP](https://github.com/upstash/context7)

MCP server providing up-to-date library documentation for AI coding agents.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-31
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `mcp`

### 🌱 [CrewAI](https://github.com/crewAIInc/crewAI)

Role-based multi-agent framework where AI agents collaborate like a specialized crew.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-29
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🌱 [CUA Computer](https://github.com/trycua/cua)

Computer-use agent framework — let AI agents control desktop GUIs.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-27
- **Signal**: 🌱 11 HN points
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🌱 [fastrender](https://github.com/wilsonzlin/fastrender)

High-performance rendering library generated with AI assistance (1M+ lines of code).

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-16
- **Signal**: 🌱 68 HN points
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🌱 [get-shit-done](https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done)

Simple task management overlay for Claude Code workflows.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-25
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### ⚡ [hermes-agent](https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent)

NousResearch's adaptive learning agent — 'the agent that grows with you.' Respected AI lab entering agent frameworks. Day 2 confirmed at +1,264/day. 6,454 stars.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-10
- **Signal**: ⚡ ⭐ 6,454 stars (+1,264/day)
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### 🌱 [human.json]()

Lightweight authorship assertion protocol — a human.json file (like robots.txt) for declaring content authorship with a vouch mechanism.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-10
- **Signal**: 🌱 49 Lobsters comments

### ⚡ [HumanLayer](https://www.humanlayer.dev)

Human-in-the-loop controls for AI agents — require human approval before sensitive actions.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-27
- **Signal**: ⚡ 354 HN points

### ⚡ [Kimi CLI](https://github.com/moonshotai/kimi-cli)

Command-line interface for Moonshot AI's Kimi LLM models.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-31
- **Signal**: ⚡ 304 HN points
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### 🌱 [LangChain](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langchain)

Popular framework for building LLM-powered applications and agent chains.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-29
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### ⚡ [LiveKit Agents](https://github.com/livekit/agents)

Real-time AI agent framework — build voice/video agents with LLMs.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-27
- **Signal**: ⚡ 266 HN points
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### 🌱 [LLMTest Needle-in-Haystack](https://github.com/gkamradt/LLMTest_NeedleInAHaystack)

Benchmark for LLM long-context retrieval — find a fact in a large document.

- **Discovered**: 2026-02-02
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🌱 [Maestro](https://github.com/RunMaestro/Maestro)

AI orchestration framework for complex multi-step agent tasks.

- **Discovered**: 2026-02-02
- **Signal**: 🌱 ⭐ 956 stars
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### ⚡ [Mastra](https://github.com/mastra-ai/mastra)

TypeScript AI agent framework — workflows, memory, tool integrations, and evals.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-21
- **Signal**: ⚡ 208 HN points
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🌱 [mcp-agent-mail](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/mcp_agent_mail)

MCP server for email — let AI agents send and read emails programmatically.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-25
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `mcp` `agent` `open-source`

### 🔥 [MiroFish](https://github.com/666ghj/MiroFish)

Chinese-origin swarm intelligence engine — 'predict anything' using particle swarm and ant colony algorithms. 20,235 stars, Day 5 at +1,857/day — crossed 20K milestone with 81% Day 1 retention (strongest in tracking dataset).

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-10
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 20,235 stars (+1,857/day)
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### ⚡ [memU](https://github.com/NevaMind-AI/memU)

Unified multi-tier memory architecture for persistent AI agent context.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-31
- **Signal**: ⚡ ⭐ 6,614 stars
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🔥 [Model Context Protocol](https://modelcontextprotocol.info/blog/mcp-next-version-update/)

Open standard connecting AI models to tools and data sources — protocol spec update.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-27
- **Signal**: 🔥 967 HN points
- **Tags**: `mcp`

### ⚡ [Moltworker](https://blog.cloudflare.com/moltworker-self-hosted-ai-agent/)

Cloudflare self-hosted AI agent running on Cloudflare Workers.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-30
- **Signal**: ⚡ 137 HN points

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-27

### ⚡ [Terminal Use](https://terminaluse.com)

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-10

- **Tags**: `agent`

### 🌱 [TimeCapsuleLLM](https://github.com/haykgrigo3/TimeCapsuleLLM)

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-13

### 🔥 [superpowers]()

Agentic skills framework and software development methodology — 80,844 stars with steady +1,706/day sustained growth. Approaching top-100 GitHub repos. Shell-based.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-12

- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### ⚡ [Axe](https://github.com/jrswab/axe)

Minimal 12MB single-binary AI agent framework — the anti-complexity counter-movement to agent framework bloat. No dependencies, no framework lock-in.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-13
- **Signal**: ⚡ 190 HN points
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### ⚡ [openrag](https://github.com/langflow-ai/openrag)

Comprehensive RAG platform combining Langflow, Docling, and Opensearch. 1,850 stars, +322/day debut.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-13
- **Signal**: ⚡ ⭐ 1,850 stars (+322/day)
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### ⚡ [InsForge](https://github.com/insforge/insforge)

Backend built for agentic development — give agents everything they need to ship fullstack apps. Agent-native infrastructure. 3,334 stars, +263/day.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-13
- **Signal**: ⚡ ⭐ 3,334 stars (+263/day)
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### ⚡ [hindsight](https://github.com/vectorize-io/hindsight)

Agent memory that learns — adaptive memory improving over time rather than static storage. From vectorize-io. 3,310 stars, +217/day.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-13
- **Signal**: ⚡ ⭐ 3,310 stars (+217/day)
- **Tags**: `agent` `memory` `open-source`

### 🔥 [claude-plugins-official](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-plugins-official)

Official Anthropic-managed directory of high-quality Claude Code plugins. Curated ecosystem vs open marketplace. 10,504 stars, steady +150/day.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-13
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 10,504 stars (+150/day)
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🔥 [AstrBot]()

IM chatbot infrastructure platform — multi-platform bot framework for messaging services. 21,938 stars with sustained +342/day growth.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-12
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 21,938 stars (+342/day)
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

---

## CLI Tools

Command-line utilities, headless browsers, sandboxed execution, and terminal tools.

**13 projects**

### 🌱 [audiowmark](https://github.com/swesterfeld/audiowmark)

Audio watermarking CLI — embed invisible watermarks in audio that survive format conversion, compression, and speed changes. Key tool for AI-generated content provenance.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-11
- **Signal**: 🌱 Lobsters discussion
- **Tags**: `open-source` `cli`

### 🔥 [Agent-FUSE](https://github.com/Jakob-em/agent-fuse)

FUSE-based virtual filesystem for AI agents — mount agent outputs as a navigable directory.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-12
- **Signal**: 🔥 513 HN points
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### 🌱 [claude-code-supervisor](https://github.com/guyskk/claude-code-supervisor)

Auto-review supervisor for Claude Code — catches mistakes before commit.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-14
- **Signal**: 🌱 50 HN points
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### ⚡ [Ghostty](https://ghostty.org)

GPU-accelerated terminal emulator by Mitchell Hashimoto — 1.3.0 release strengthens the terminal-as-creative-surface for AI agent workflows.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-10
- **Signal**: ⚡ 32 Lobsters comments

### 🔥 [Lightpanda](https://lightpanda.io)

Zig-based headless browser optimized for AI agent web scraping — fast DOM implementation.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-12
- **Signal**: 🔥 513 HN points

### 🌱 [mcpc](https://github.com/apify/mcp-cli)

Universal CLI client for Model Context Protocol servers.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-14
- **Signal**: 🌱 50 HN points
- **Tags**: `mcp` `open-source` `cli`

### 🌱 [Nudge](https://github.com/attunehq/nudge)

Guardrails enforcement layer for coding AI — stops unsafe agent actions before execution.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-14
- **Signal**: 🌱 50 HN points
- **Tags**: `agent` `open-source`

### 🌱 [Oubli](https://github.com/dremok/oubli)

Persistent fractal memory system for AI agents.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-14
- **Signal**: 🌱 50 HN points
- **Tags**: `memory` `open-source`

### 🔥 [Seapie](https://github.com/hirsimaki-markus)

Python debugger with REPL breakpoints — inject an interactive Python shell at any point during execution.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-12
- **Signal**: 🔥 513 HN points
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🌱 [yolo-cage](https://github.com/borenstein/yolo-cage)

Sandboxed agent execution environment with containment controls.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-14
- **Signal**: 🌱 52 HN points
- **Tags**: `agent` `security` `open-source`

### ⚡ [SiteSpy]()

Webpage watcher that exposes changes as RSS feeds — monitor competitors, libraries, documentation changes. CLI-first design with RSS output for pipeline integration.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-12
- **Signal**: ⚡ 222 HN points
- **Tags**: `cli` `open-source`

### 🔥 [fish-speech](https://github.com/fishaudio/fish-speech)

State-of-the-art open-source text-to-speech — Python-based with CLI for batch processing. Core audio generation node in creative pipelines. 26,614 stars, sustained +637/day. 2,237 forks.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-12
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 26,614 stars (+637/day)
- **Tags**: `open-source` `cli`

### 🌱 [Autoresearch@home]()

Distributed research framework using the BOINC/@home paradigm — volunteer computing for AI research tasks. CLI-native with local research agents contributing to shared findings.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-12
- **Signal**: 🌱 62 HN points
- **Tags**: `open-source` `cli`

---

## Developer Tools

Package managers, AI code assistants, build systems, runtime managers, and dev workflow tools.

**28 projects**

### 🌱 [Aider](https://github.com/Aider-AI/aider)

AI pair programmer in your terminal — edit code across files with GPT/Claude.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-29
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🌱 [Aviator Runbooks](https://www.aviator.co/runbooks)

Automated engineering runbooks with CI/CD integration for incident response.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-27
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked

### ⚡ [blender-mcp](https://github.com/ahujasid/blender-mcp)

MCP server for Blender — let AI control Blender 3D scenes via natural language.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-27
- **Signal**: ⚡ 151 HN points
- **Tags**: `mcp`

### 🌱 [Continue](https://github.com/continuedev/continue)

Open-source AI code assistant — IDE plugin that connects to any LLM.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-29
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### ⚡ [DenchClaw](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=46850000)

Local-first CRM built on top of OpenClaw — all customer data stored locally, AI for relationship insights.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-10
- **Signal**: ⚡ 112 HN points

### 🌱 [denobox](https://github.com/simonw/denobox)

JavaScript sandbox via Deno subprocess — safely execute untrusted AI-generated code.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-26
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `security` `open-source`

### 🔥 [GCP generative-ai](https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/generative-ai)

Google's official Gemini AI samples and tutorials — surging to 15,439 stars (+1,282/day).

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-10
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ 15,439 stars (+1,282/day)
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🌱 [ggc](https://github.com/bmf-san/ggc)

Go GitHub CLI helper for common git/GitHub workflows.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-27
- **Signal**: 🌱 65 HN points · ⭐ 259 stars
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🔥 [iCloud Photos Downloader](https://github.com/icloud-photos-downloader)

CLI tool to download your entire iCloud Photo Library to local storage.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-12
- **Signal**: 🔥 513 HN points
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🔥 [impeccable](https://github.com/pbakaus/impeccable)

AI design language by Paul Bakaus (ex-Google, jQuery UI creator) — structured design tokens that make AI-generated UIs look polished. ~4,000 stars, Day 2 sustained at +700-900/day.

- **Discovered**: 2026-03-10
- **Signal**: 🔥 ⭐ ~4,000 stars (+700-900/day)
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### ⚡ [Infisical](https://github.com/Infisical/infisical)

Open-source secret management platform — sync secrets across environments and teams.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-27
- **Signal**: ⚡ 131 HN points
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🔥 [just](https://github.com/casey/just)

Modern command runner — a cleaner Makefile alternative.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-27
- **Signal**: 🔥 652 HN points
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### 🌱 [Logseq](https://github.com/logseq/logseq)

Local-first knowledge management and outliner with a bidirectional graph view.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-29
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### ⚡ [mise](https://github.com/jdx/mise)

Polyglot runtime version manager — replaces nvm, rbenv, pyenv, and more.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-27
- **Signal**: ⚡ 141 HN points
- **Tags**: `open-source`

### ⚡ [moon](https://moonrepo.dev)

Monorepo build system and task runner for polyglot codebases.

- **Discovered**: 2025-12-27
- **Signal**: ⚡ 200 HN points

### 🌱 [Mousefood]()

Library for embedding interactive terminal UI components in Python applications.

- **Discovered**: 2026-01-29
- **Signal**: 🌱 Early / untracked
- **Tags**: `open-source` `cli`

### ⚡ [Cubic (formerly mrge)](https://www.cubic.dev/)
